name: Italian Bread KH
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 2 cups flour and all the other ingredients except water to a food processor.
2. Pulse several times to mix thoroughly.
3. Add half the water and pulse 4 times.
4. Add remaining water and flour, then process for 60 seconds.
5. Turn dough onto a floured surface and let rest 20 minutes.
6. Roll dough out and place in a French pan that has been sprinkled with corn meal.
7. Brush dough with corn oil.
8. Refrigerate for 2 to 24 hours.
9. Remove from refrigerator and let stand for 10 minutes.
10. Bake at 425 degrees for 20 minutes.
11. Brush with beaten egg white and bake another 10 minutes.
